{"cards": [{"name": "Emberpeak Raider", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": "The clan's fastest scouts strike before the enemy knows they're there.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 11: Common red creature with keyword-only design. 3/2 haste menace for 3 mana tests aggressive statlines - slightly above rate but requires attacking with two creatures to be blocked, creating interesting combat decisions. Haste enables immediate pressure while menace rewards going wide."}, {"name": "Worldscorch Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{6}{R}{R}", "cmc": 8, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample
When ~ enters, it deals 4 damage to each creature and each planeswalker.
Whenever ~ attacks, you may have it deal damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "Its roar shakes mountains; its breath reshapes them.", "power": "7", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Slot 12: Mythic red dragon with multi-ability design. Splashy board-clearing ETB effect followed by repeatable removal on attack. High mana cost balanced by immediate board impact and continuing threat. Flying/trample ensure it connects for damage while the abilities provide both defensive utility and offensive pressure."}, {"name": "Verdant Pilgrimage", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every journey begins with knowing where you wish to go.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 13: Common green sorcery with single ability testing search templating. Classic ramp spell that finds basic lands for hand rather than battlefield, providing card advantage and mana fixing. Costs 2 mana to be fair at common rarity while still being playable in limited formats."}, {"name": "Ironbark Colossus", "mana_cost": "{5}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Ancient beyond measure, it moves through the forest like a living avalanche.", "power": "7", "toughness": "5", "lovça": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 14: Common green creature testing P/T ceiling. 7/5 trample for 6 mana represents maximum stats at common - total P+T of 12 exceeds CMC+3 guideline but trample-only keeps it simple. Large body rewards ramp strategies while trample ensures damage gets through in board stalls."}, {"name": "Lifeweaver's Bond", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Aura", "oracle_text": "Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample.
Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, you gain that much life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Slot 15: Uncommon green aura with multi-ability design. Tests enchantment templating with static buff, keyword granting, and triggered ability. +2/+2 and trample create aggressive threat while lifegain trigger provides defensive value. Uncommon complexity appropriate for multiple interlocking abilities on single enchantment."}]}
